cursor_legacy_shim_lines: All canonical instructions live in AGENTS.md - read that first.
All AI inference goes through backend/core_ai.py.
Never inline system prompts - use prompt_registry.py.
Never log or expose PII in error messages.
AI-generated health advice must include a medical disclaimer and recommend consulting a qualified clinician.
Database schema changes must update SQLAlchemy models, Pydantic schemas, and migration/startup logic together.
Tests must mock all AI calls; never hit real APIs.
copilot_repo_lines: All canonical instructions live in AGENTS.md - read that first.
All AI inference goes through backend/core_ai.py.
Never inline system prompts - use prompt_registry.py.
Never log or expose PII in error messages.
AI-generated health advice must include a medical disclaimer and recommend consulting a qualified clinician.
Database schema changes must update SQLAlchemy models, Pydantic schemas, and migration/startup logic together.
Backend is FastAPI (Python), frontend is Next.js App Router (TypeScript).
ML model loading is owned by prediction.py.
Database sessions via Depends(database.get_db) in routes.

cursor_root_rule.description: AI Healthcare System - Root rules (always apply)
lines: All canonical instructions live in AGENTS.md - read that first.
All AI inference goes through backend/core_ai.py.
Never inline system prompts - use prompt_registry.py.
Never log or expose PII in error messages.

copilot_lines: All AI calls go through core_ai.py - never import google.generativeai directly.
Use Depends(database.get_db) for DB sessions in routes.
Update models.py, schemas.py, and main.py migration/startup logic together for schema changes.
HIPAA: Health data must be scoped to current_user.id.

copilot_lines: Use NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL for browser-facing backend URLs and default to http://127.0.0.1:8000.
Include medical disclaimers in prediction views.

copilot_lines: Mock all AI calls - never hit real APIs in tests.

cursor_lines: Mock all AI calls - never hit real APIs.
Use fresh test database per session.

product: AI Healthcare System - Intelligent medical diagnostic platform.
Provides disease risk prediction (diabetes, heart, liver, kidney, lungs).
AI-powered medical chatbot with RAG-based patient context.
Multi-tier AI inference: Ollama (local) -> Gemini (cloud) -> OpenAI/Anthropic (optional).
Telemedicine appointment booking and health record management.
Enterprise features: role-based access, PDF reports, compliance monitoring.
tech: AI: Multi-tier - Ollama (local), Google Gemini (cloud), OpenAI/Anthropic (optional).
RAG: Gemini embeddings, cosine similarity vector store.
Auth: JWT tokens, bcrypt password hashing.
Deployment: Docker, Render, Hugging Face Spaces.
structure: backend/ - FastAPI app, API routes, AI modules, ML services, database models.
frontend/ - Next.js App Router UI with src/app, src/components, hooks, and lib.
frontend_legacy/ - old Python UI kept for reference only.
scripts/ - DevX utilities (ai_context.py, sync_agent_adapters.py), DB management.
data/ - Training datasets for ML models.
